title: SCP-867, Blood Spruce
description: A red spruce tree, but as you touch it, you will grow an Instance out of your body
body:
The Blood Spruce adds a new tree. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-867, also known as The Blood Spruce.


SCP-867 can naturally generate in several biomes and appears similar to a normal spruce tree, but with red leaves. Touching its leaves can infect players with a dangerous condition that worsens over time. The Infected Player will take damage and after a few minutes, the player will die and a new Instance of SCP-867 will appear.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-867 spawn?

SCP-867 spawns in birch forests, taigas and meadow biomes. There may be multiple SCP-867.

</details>



![SCP-867](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66bf73afd86d2be3b06d8cd73dc9724971d248fa_0.webp)

SCP-867, known as the Blood Spruce, is an anomalous tree that generates in taigas, meadows, and birch forests. It resembles a normal spruce tree, but its leaves are red. If a player destroys or touches the red leaves within a range of two blocks, they become infected. The infection is slow at first, causing occasional random damage. Over time, the condition worsens, dealing more frequent and more severe damage. After approximately four minutes, if the infected player dies while still infected, a new SCP-867 instance will grow from the body. If the infection continues for six minutes, it reaches its final stage, causing extremely high damage and quickly leading to death. Undead mobs and golems are completely immune to the infection and will not be affected by SCP-867.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
